testcase.name: verifyMouseHover

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (75, 23). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.217) Build info: version: '4.33.0', revision: '2c6aaad03a' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [21d913e69e4ab70a3e2169c2cd878be9, clickElement {id=f.AF66C099C017DD66DD449ECCFF4F3856.d.E13CE197CB992285A4E8CB1E0A3C200E.e.779}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.217, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.178 (d096af1c9e9..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Loc...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:65255}, goog:processID: 13564, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:65255/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.217, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (21d913e69e4ab70a3e2169c2cd878be9)] -> xpath: //a[text()='Mobiles']] Session ID: 21d913e69e4ab70a3e2169c2cd878be9
